title: BETO Selects Six Projects for Phase II Small Business Research and Development Grants
content: The U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) announced awards totaling $142 million for small businesses through DOEâ€™s Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) and Small Business Technology Transfer (STTR) Phase II funding. Across DOE, 123 projects in 34 states received funding to pursue clean energy research and development projects. The average Phase II award is $1.1 million for a period of two years.
author: Analysts Account
source: Office of Energy Efficiency & Renewable Energy
